creator: nik@blueberry.co.uk
text:
After sup'ing stable from Mar 9th -> 11th (it took some time,
        my link is slow), on to a system that was until then running
        vanilla 2.1, going to /usr/src and executing

             make world

        it eventually fails when trying to install lp.4. Investigation
        reveals that /usr/src/share/man/man4/lp.4 doesn't exist.

How-To-Repeat: 
        Install FreeBSD 2.1.0-RELEASE
        cd /usr/share/examples/sup
        sup -v stable-supfile
        cd /usr/src
        make world
